strengths: ~19 years of hands-on software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and low-latency backend systems, exceeding the 15-year requirement
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform deployed on Kubernetes and used by Green Map
Current exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, including MCP code generators and frameworks for agentic workflows at re:cinq
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or demonstrated AI-powered products at scale — AI work is limited to roughly one year of agent tooling contributions
No evidence of director/principal-level scope: roles are senior/staff IC delivery positions without organization-wide technical strategy or advisory to strategic customers
No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field, and cloud experience (AWS CDK, k8s deployment) is applied rather than platform-strategy level

key_factors.factor: AI expertise depth vs. role's AI strategy focus
Seniority gap to director-level IC scope

response.justification: The role's core competencies are: 15+ years of engineering (met — employment history spans 2006 to present), recognized AI expertise with demonstrated AI products (largely absent — only recent MCP/agentic tooling contributions at re:cinq, no shipped AI products or publications), cloud platform strategy (partial — AWS CDK and Kubernetes usage is implementation-level, not future-state strategy), principal-level influence and external advisory (absent — talks and workshops are testing/GIS community events, not strategic customer advisory), and entrepreneurship (met — GISCollective founder). Meeting the minimums but missing the defining preferred qualifications for an AI-strategy principal role yields a below-threshold fit.
